flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Grossmont College rose 33% between 2007 and 2010 ($2.6k → $3.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Grossmont College rose 29% between 2007 and 2010 ($625 → $806).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Grossmont College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Grossmont College rose 38% between 2007 and 2010 (13.0k → 18.0k).
